overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles, featuring long dining tables with students and large stained glass windows. A translucent ghostly character moves slowly through the foreground as the camera proceeds down the central stone aisle.

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a translucent ghost character slowly gliding down the central aisle of a magnificent gothic great hall. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the high vaulted ceiling above long wooden dining tables where students sit. Large stained glass windows dominate the far end wall, while stone archways line both sides of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic great hall, gliding from the entrance toward the distant, illuminated far wall. It begins by trailing a translucent ghost character as it drifts slowly down the central stone aisle, passing beneath a high vaulted ceiling filled with hundreds of floating candles. As the camera proceeds, the view expands to reveal long wooden dining tables crowded with students and the rhythmic sequence of stone archways lining the sides of the hall. The scene finally culminates as the camera draws closer to the far end of the room, where massive, intricate stained glass windows dominate the architecture.
